original: The female soldier brings up her hatchet and deftly parries your attack. Throwing you off, she then twirls the hand-axe in her hand.
dusky red
Can Crit
Red Myr
the

You’re facing off against an amber-haired ant-girl armed with a hatchet and a handgun. Given her desecrated Scarlet Federation uniform - her country, name, and rank patches are all torn off - she’s definitely a deserter.

Her shirt is torn wide open in a very un-red like manner. Her pert, small breasts are on display, though there’s a bullet scar just to the side of her heart. There’s another scar over her right eye, which she seems unable to fully close.

Hanging from both her gently curving hips are hand grenades. They’re attached to her belt, ready to unclick and throw at a moment’s notice.
The seasoned soldier throws herself sideways. Your attack misses her by an inch and she deftly tumbles back to her feet.
heavy handgun
a heavy handgun
thick chitin
Her feint fails - you duck under her slicing blow and scamper out of the way. She reloads her gun with a loud click and a focused stare.
Her attack falls far short of hitting you. Instead, her bullet whizzes past harmlessly.
There’s a ringing shot and a dull ache of impact
, even through your shields.
A hot, burning sensation sprays out from your chest. Your [pc.legs] go weak and you fall to the ground.
With such shoddy vision, her grenade throw falls short of her mark. You dart back and easily dodge the resulting blast.
There’s a loud ‘whump’ and a cloud of red mist swiftly engulfs you.
Fortunately for you, the smoke doesn’t leak through your airtight [pc.armor], but it obscures your vision just briefly.

There’s a loud ‘whump’ and a cloud of red mist swiftly engulfs you. Your skin prickles and your [pc.nipples] harden. Lower down, a glorious ache spreads through your [pc.groin]. All you want to do is touch yourself!
You resist her erotic enticements... for now.
